creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
While trying to install EMBY server I am forced to remove anything that is using libwmf (with x11) because EMBY is conpiled with libwmf-nox11 by default.


# pkg install emby-server
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        emby-server: 3.0.5781.2
        mono: 4.2.2.10
        libwmf-nox11: 0.2.8.4_15
        ImageMagick-nox11: 6.9.3.1,1
        libmediainfo: 0.7.82
        libzen: 0.7.82
        tinyxml2: 2.2.0,1

The process will require 240 MiB more space.
67 MiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
